privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the ReqView Example Project (synthetic demo data). The target document to edit is the SRS document located at /home/ga/Documents/ReqView/decompose_req_project/documents/SRS.json. The expected additions are a parent requirement ('System Performance') with three specific nested children detailing latency, concurrency, and uptime, which directly match the task instructions.
